title: Assertion `flags3==pIn3->flags' failed
poc: SELECT 0 IN(SELECT v1) FROM v0 WHERE v1 = 2 OR(SELECT v1 LIMIT 0);
key_bug_features: SELECT statement with subquery and OR condition
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL);
SELECT 1 IN(SELECT num FROM subquery_table) FROM test_table WHERE value = '1' OR (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL);
